financial_metrics.guidance: Management guided to continued revenue growth and stable gross margin while maintaining elevated investment.

document_sections.heading: EPS
document_sections.text: Diluted EPS exceeded consensus. Margin expansion and operating leverage supported the EPS beat, while tax and one-time items should be checked before treating the beat as fully recurring.

document_sections.heading: Revenue
document_sections.text: Net revenue increased year over year, supported by enterprise demand and higher cloud-related product shipments. The growth rate exceeded the provided consensus snapshot.

document_sections.heading: Cash Flow
document_sections.text: Operating cash flow remained strong, but elevated capital expenditure may pressure near-term free cash flow before investment intensity moderates.

document_sections.heading: Guidance
document_sections.text: Management guidance assumes continued demand from large customers, stable gross margin, and sustained investment to support future capacity.

document_sections.heading: Segments
document_sections.text: Segment performance improved in data center and software, while consumer-exposed businesses remained more sensitive to channel inventory normalization.

document_sections.heading: Risk
document_sections.text: Forward-looking statements highlight demand uncertainty, customer concentration, supply constraints, foreign exchange volatility, and execution risk around elevated capital investment.
